## Claude Code Channel Issues — Research Report

### The Core Problem: `notifications/claude/channel` Silently Dropped

The most-reported class of issue is that MCP channel plugins (Telegram, Discord) successfully connect and outbound tools (reply, react) work fine, but inbound `notifications/claude/channel` MCP notifications are never surfaced as `<channel>` tags in the conversation.
